style_base: Square 1:1 premium food product photo on dark rustic wood table, warm studio light from top-left, soft shadow, realistic glass jar centered, premium artisan mood, sharp focus on label and jar texture, no hands, no people, no watermark, no text overlay outside the product label.

products.name: Alho Tradicional
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor garlic. Add fresh garlic bulbs and cloves around the jar. Keep label style clean and readable, premium artisan composition.

products.name: Pimenta Defumada
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor smoked pepper. Add smoked wood slices and red chili peppers around the jar. Keep rustic premium look.

products.name: Ervas Finas
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor fine herbs. Add basil leaves, thyme and parsley around the jar. Fresh green accents with tomato base.

products.name: Tomate Seco
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor sun dried tomato. Add sun dried tomato pieces in a small wooden bowl next to the jar.

products.name: Mostarda Artesanal
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor artisanal mustard. Add mustard seeds and a rustic spoon with mustard beside the jar.

products.name: Barbecue Caseiro
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor homemade barbecue. Add charred wood chips and light smoke mood around the jar, subtle barbecue visual cues.

products.name: Chimichurri
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor chimichurri. Add chopped parsley, oregano and garlic in a small bowl near the jar.

products.name: Cebola Caramelizada
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor caramelized onion. Add sliced caramelized onions in a small bowl and one whole onion near the jar.

products.name: Alho Poro
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor leek and garlic. Add fresh leek stalks and garlic cloves framing the jar.

products.name: Pimenta Verde
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor green pepper. Add fresh green chili peppers and tomatoes around the jar.

products.name: Gengibre Citrus
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor ginger citrus. Add sliced ginger root and lemon zest in a small bowl near the jar.

products.name: Mostarda e Mel
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor mustard and honey. Add honey dipper with honey thread and mustard seeds near the jar.

products.name: Jalapeno
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor jalapeno. Add sliced jalapeno and whole green jalapenos around the jar.

products.name: Pesto da Casa
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor house pesto style. Add basil leaves, olive oil drops and pine nuts in a small bowl near the jar.

products.name: Curry Suave
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor mild curry. Add curry powder in a wooden spoon and turmeric roots around the jar.

products.name: Defumado Premium
products.prompt: Tomato sauce jar flavor premium smoked olive blend. Add green olives and charred wood slices around the jar.
